---
title: "statdown Test File - HTML Widgets"
---

# statdown Test File

This document serves as a test case for the **statdown** package, demonstrating
the package handles htmlwidgets.

```{r htmlwidget-example, echo=FALSE}
# Load DT package (make sure it's in your package dependencies)
library(DT)
# Create a simple interactive data table
datatable(iris)
```

End of test file.
